description: You are a Data Engineer at a digital music distributor. Your task is to curate three new playlists in the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db) by populating the playlists and playlist_track tables. Create a playlist named 'Long Rock Anthems' containing all 'Rock' genre tracks with a duration strictly greater than 300,000 milliseconds. Create a playlist named 'Global Bestsellers' containing the track with the highest total quantity sold for each distinct BillingCountry (if tied, use the lowest TrackId). Create a playlist named 'Hidden Gems' containing all tracks that have never been purchased. Export a summary CSV to /home/ga/Documents/exports/playlist_summary.csv with columns PlaylistName, TrackCount, and TotalDurationMinutes (rounded to 2 decimal places), sorted alphabetically by PlaylistName. Save the SQL script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/playlist_curation.sql. Use 'Chinook' as the database connection name.
